summary: Closed the verifier-reported migration and readiness portion of Codex OAuth concurrency-one enforcement. Legacy rows are repaired by migration, the database rejects future nonexclusive Codex OAuth rows, and both DB-backed and payload-backed launch readiness reject max_parallel_runs other than one.

gapStatuses.requirement: Complete concurrency-one enforcement across the profile lifecycle
gapStatuses.resolvedInAttempt: Added migration repair plus a database check constraint and made canonical DB/payload readiness reject nonexclusive Codex OAuth profiles.
gapStatuses.remaining: Runtime selection, host allocation, reconnect, and disconnect must still acquire the shared exclusive lease; focused pytest execution remains unavailable in this runtime.

gapStatuses.requirement: Use one exclusive capacity lane for all consumers and maintenance
gapStatuses.remaining: Wire direct, Omnigent, reconnect, disconnect, and credential maintenance consumers to provider-profile-manager:codex_cli with release-last semantics.

gapStatuses.requirement: Define secret-free credential, binding, generation, and host-lease contracts
gapStatuses.remaining: Add runtime-neutral durable refs, ownership and generation validation, and cross-profile rejection.

gapStatuses.requirement: Materialize and preflight the exact destination OAuth home
gapStatuses.remaining: Implement selected-volume mount, competing-credential clearing, permission repair, and destination-host login/harness/generation checks.

gapStatuses.requirement: Provide profile-bound static and on-demand hosts and routing
gapStatuses.remaining: Implement the common binding/readiness contract, profile resolution, exact-host routing, and retry-safe launch behavior.

gapStatuses.requirement: Implement generation, drain, cleanup, reconciliation, and recovery
gapStatuses.remaining: Coordinate generation advancement and drain, reject stale hosts, release last, reconcile stale state, and persist safe recovery refs.

gapStatuses.requirement: Expose redacted lifecycle diagnostics and failure attribution
gapStatuses.remaining: Publish secret-safe profile, lease, binding, preflight, session, terminal, cooldown/authentication, and cleanup evidence.

gapStatuses.requirement: Add required boundary and combined-stack verification
gapStatuses.resolvedInAttempt: Added readiness and migration regression tests.
gapStatuses.remaining: Run the tests in an environment with pytest and add lifecycle boundary coverage as each remaining production seam is implemented.

targetedLocalChecks.details: The runner completed repository audits but Python reported: No module named pytest. No tests started.
